{{infobox football tournament season
|title           = Copa do Brasil
|year            = 1996
|other_titles    = Copa do Brasil 1996
|image           =
|image_size       = 250px
|caption         = 
|country         = Brazil
|dates           = February 6 – June 16
|num_teams       = 40
|winners       = [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro (MG)]]
|second       = [[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras (SP)]]
|matches         = 70
|goals           = 187
|scoring_leader = [[Luizão (footballer, born 1975)|Luizao]] (8)
|award          = 
|prev_season      = [[1995 Copa do Brasil|1995]]
|next_season      = [[1997 Copa do Brasil|1997]]
}}

The '''Copa do Brasil 1996''' was the 8th staging of the [[Copa do Brasil]].

The competition started on February 6, 1996, and concluded on June 16, 1996, with the second leg of the final, held at the [[Estádio Palestra Itália|Estádio Parque Antártica]] in [[São Paulo]], in which [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]] lifted the trophy for the second time after a 2-1 victory over [[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]].

[[Luiz Carlos Bombonato Goulart|Luizão]], of [[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]], with 8 goals, was the competition's topscorer.

==Format==
The preliminary round was disputed by 16 clubs, while the first stage was disputed by 32 clubs, including the ones qualified from the preliminary stage. The competition was disputed in a [[Single-elimination tournament|knock-out]] format. In the preliminary stage and in the first round if the away team won the first leg with an advantage of at least two goals, the second leg was not played and the club automatically qualified to the next round. The following rounds were played over two legs and the [[away goals rule]] was used.

==Competition stages==

===Preliminary round===
{{TwoLegStart}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Ferroviário Atlético Clube|Ferroviário (CE)]]||0-3|'''[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás (GO)]]'''||0-1|0-2}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Araguaína Futebol e Regatas|União Araguainense (TO)]]||2-2|'''[[Vila Nova Futebol Clube|Vila Nova (GO)]]'''||2-1|0-1}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Cristal Atlético Clube|Cristal (AP)]]||1-4|'''[[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz (PE)]]'''||0-1|1-3}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Maranhão Atlético Clube|Maranhão (MA)]]||1-2|'''[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória (BA)]]'''||0-0|1-3}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Ji-Paraná Futebol Clube|Ji-Paraná (RO)]]||1-4|'''[[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético (PR)]]'''||1-1|0-3}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Atlético Roraima Clube|Roraima (RR)]]||1-3|'''[[Atlético Clube Juventus|Juventus (AC)]]'''||1-3|-}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Nacional Futebol Clube|Nacional (AM)]]||1-3|'''[[América Futebol Clube (MG)|América (MG)]]'''||1-3|-}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Sociedade Esportiva do Gama|Gama (DF)]]||1-3|'''[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia (BA)]]'''||0-1|1-2}}
|}

===Knockout stages===
{{32TeamBracket

| RD1-team01=[[América Futebol Clube (MG)|América (MG)]]
| RD1-score01=1 1
| RD1-team02='''[[São Paulo Futebol Clube|São Paulo (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score02=2 4

| RD1-team03=[[Esporte Clube Operário|Operário (MT)]]
| RD1-score03=0
| RD1-team04='''[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score04=2

| RD1-team05=[[Linhares Esporte Clube|Linhares (ES)]]
| RD1-score05=0 1
| RD1-team06='''[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score06=1 4

| RD1-team07=[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia (BA)]]
| RD1-score07=0 1
| RD1-team08='''[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba (PR)]]'''
| RD1-score08=0 3

| RD1-team09=[[Santa Cruz Recreativo Esporte Clube|Santa Cruz (PB)]]
| RD1-score09=0
| RD1-team10='''[[Club de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score10=2

| RD1-team11=[[Atlético Clube Juventus|Juventus (AC)]]
| RD1-score11=1 0
| RD1-team12='''[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro (MG)]]'''
| RD1-score12=1 4

| RD1-team13=[[ABC Futebol Clube|ABC (RN)]]
| RD1-score13=0
| RD1-team14='''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score14=4

| RD1-team15='''[[Clube do Remo|Remo (PA)]]'''
| RD1-score15=1 1
| RD1-team16=[[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz (PE)]]
| RD1-score16=1 0

| RD1-team17=[[Associação Atlética Cori-Sabbá|Cori-Sabbá (PI)]]
| RD1-score17=1 0
| RD1-team18='''[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score18=0 3

| RD1-team19=[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória (BA)]]
| RD1-score19=0 0
| RD1-team20='''[[Paraná Clube|Paraná (PR)]]'''
| RD1-score20=0 1

| RD1-team21=[[Club Sportivo Sergipe|Sergipe (SE)]]
| RD1-score21=0
| RD1-team22='''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score22=8

| RD1-team23=[[Vila Nova Futebol Clube|Vila Nova (GO)]]
| RD1-score23=0 1
| RD1-team24='''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético (MG)]]'''
| RD1-score24=1 4

| RD1-team25='''[[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético (PR)]]'''
| RD1-score25=3 1
| RD1-team26=[[Santos Futebol Clube|Santos (SP)]]
| RD1-score26=0 1

| RD1-team27=[[Operário Futebol Clube (MS)|Operário (MS)]]
| RD1-score27=0 1
| RD1-team28='''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score28=1 3

| RD1-team29=[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás (GO)]]
| RD1-score29=2 0
| RD1-team30='''[[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma (SC)]]'''
| RD1-score30=1 3

| RD1-team31=[[Clube de Regatas Brasil|CRB (AL)]]
| RD1-score31=1
| RD1-team32='''[[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score32=4

| RD2-team01=São Paulo (SP)<ref>São Paulo fielded an ineligible player in the first leg so they lost 5 points.</ref>
| RD2-score01=1
| RD2-team02='''Internacional (RS)'''
| RD2-score02=1

| RD2-team03='''Flamengo (RJ)'''
| RD2-score03=2 0
| RD2-team04=Coritiba (PR)
| RD2-score04=1 0

| RD2-team05=Vasco (RJ)
| RD2-score05=2 1
| RD2-team06='''Cruzeiro (MG)'''
| RD2-score06=6 1

| RD2-team07='''Corinthians (SP)'''
| RD2-score07=0 1
| RD2-team08=Remo (PA)
| RD2-score08=0 1

| RD2-team09=Botafogo (RJ)
| RD2-score09=0 0 (pen: 2)
| RD2-team10='''Paraná (PR)'''
| RD2-score10=0 0 (pen: 4)

| RD2-team11='''Palmeiras (SP)'''
| RD2-score11=2 5
| RD2-team12=Atlético (MG)
| RD2-score12=1 0

| RD2-team13=Atlético (PR)
| RD2-score13=1 0
| RD2-team14='''Grêmio (RS)'''
| RD2-score14=1 3

| RD2-team15='''Criciúma (SC)'''
| RD2-score15=1 3
| RD2-team16=Fluminense (RJ)
| RD2-score16=2 1

| RD3-team01=Internacional (RS)
| RD3-score01=3 1
| RD3-team02='''Flamengo (RJ)'''
| RD3-score02=2 3

| RD3-team03='''Cruzeiro (MG)'''
| RD3-score03=4 2
| RD3-team04=Corinthians (SP)
| RD3-score04=0 3

| RD3-team05=Paraná (PR)
| RD3-score05=0 1
| RD3-team06='''Palmeiras (SP)'''
| RD3-score06=2 3

| RD3-team07='''Grêmio (RS)'''
| RD3-score07=1 2
| RD3-team08=Criciúma (SC)
| RD3-score08=1 0

| RD4-team01=Flamengo (RJ)
| RD4-score01=1 0
| RD4-team02='''Cruzeiro (MG)'''
| RD4-score02=1 0

| RD4-team03='''Palmeiras (SP)'''
| RD4-score03=3 1
| RD4-team04=Grêmio (RS)
| RD4-score04=1 2

| RD5-team01='''Cruzeiro (MG)'''
| RD5-score01=1 2
| RD5-team02=Palmeiras (SP)
| RD5-score02=1 1
}}

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center; margin: 0 auto;"
|-
!Copa do Brasil<br />1996 Winners
|-
|[[Image:Bandeira de Minas Gerais.svg|100px|Minas Gerais]]<br>'''[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]]'''<br/>'''Second Title'''
|}

===Notes===
<references/>

==References==
* [https://web.archive.org/web/20070829112944/http://paginas.terra.com.br/esporte/rsssfbrasil/tables/cbr1996.htm Copa do Brasil 1996 at RSSSF]
*{{in lang|pt}} [http://www.campeoesdofutebol.com.br/art_copabrasil.html Copa do Brasil top scorers at Campeões do Futebol]
*{{in lang|pt}} [https://web.archive.org/web/20071025075904/http://bolanaarea.com/tabela_copabr_1996.htm Copa do Brasil 1996 table at Bola na Área]
*''Enciclopédia do Futebol Brasileiro'', Volume 2 - Lance, Rio de Janeiro: Aretê Editorial S/A, 2001.

{{Copa do Brasil Seasons}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Copa Do Brasil 1996}}
[[Category:Copa do Brasil seasons|1996]]
[[Category:1996 in Brazilian football]]
[[Category:1996 in domestic association football cups]]
